name: Moodle App Android Build
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y android-sdk && echo 'export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/usr/lib/android-sdk' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools' >> ~/.bashrc
postCreateCommand: npm install && npx cordova platform add android
